properties.entities: Celanese Corp., Mitsui & Co., Fairway Methonal LLC
properties.capture_storage_details: carbon capture and utilization (CCU) project at its Clear Lake, Texas, site as part of its Fairway Methanol joint venture with Mitsui & Co., Ltd. The project is expected to capture 180,000 metric tons of CO2 industrial emissions and produce 130,000 metric tons of low-carbon methanol per year.
new facility that can capture up to 1,000 tons of CO2 per year, sequestered in concrete via CarbonCure
properties.notes: Facility unveiling November 2023, storing in concrete

properties.entities: University of Illinois, Linde, BASF, Affiliated Engineers, Affiliated Construction Services, Visage Energy
properties.capture_storage_details: Including using CO2 as feedstock for algae; scrubber wastewater treatment technology; beneficial reuse of coal fly ash in plastics; and advancing the design of a hybrid power plant and energy storage system.10-megawatt-electric capture system, which is based on Linde-BASF post-combustion CO2 capture technology and is designed to capture 200 metric tons of carbon dioxide daily.
properties.notes: Funded by DOE/NETL, estimated the construction and operation of the Dallman Unit 4 carbon capture facility will have a regional economic impact of $47.1 million and generate tax revenue of $5.6 million. Launched pilot phase Jan 2023

properties.entities: Standard Lithium, Aqualung, Mission Creek Resources
properties.capture_storage_details: Carbon Capture Pilot plant undergoing testing at a natural gas processing plant to determine how CCUS can factor into lithium brine processing and sequestration
properties.notes: The Carbon Capture Pilot Plant will assess the technical and financial viability of capturing CO2 directly from natural gas burning flue-gas streams, and will inform how Standard Lithium can use technology to minimize CO2 emissions at future production facilities.

properties.capture_storage_details: What would be the Permian Basin's largest CCS project, Lucid purchased by Targa in July 2022

1PointFive has leased land from Weyerhaeuser Company to develop a carbon sequestration hub in northeastern Livingston Parish, Louisiana. 1PointFive intends to use the land to safely and securely sequester CO₂ in underground rock formations while Weyerhaeuser continues to manage the above-ground acreage as a working forest

properties.entities: Denbury Carbon Solutions, Natural Resource Partners
properties.capture_storage_details: Develop a CO2 sequestration site on approximately 75,000 acres of pore space
properties.notes: Total pore space capacity of 300M tons, but unknown what annual injection will be. No news on this project since 2022 announcement. It is possible ExxonMobil scrapped it after acquiring Denbury Denbury indicated they may consider expanding its existing Gulf Coast CO2 pipeline network to connect to this site.

properties.capture_storage_details: Low-carbon hydrogen, ammonia and carbon capture facility is expected to produce one billion cubic feet of low-carbon hydrogen per day, making it the largest low-carbon hydrogen project in the world at planned startup in 2027-2028
properties.notes: Currently in DOE FEED stage (January 2023)

properties.entities: Quail Run Carbon, NAES Corporation, Elysian Ventures LLC, Starwood Energy
properties.capture_storage_details: carbon capture facility that will capture approximately 95% of the CO2 emissions from the adjacent existing Quail Run Energy Center located in Ector County.
properties.notes: Applied at Texas Comptroller in April 2022, no public announcements as of yet.

properties.capture_storage_details: Capture on blue ammonia production with storage below the facility
properties.notes: First CO2 injection expected by 2025

properties.entities: Battelle, AirCapture LLC, Southern Co, Carbonvert
properties.capture_storage_details: Will leverage available thermal energy from Southern Company’s Joseph M. Farley nuclear power plant in Columbia, Alabama
properties.notes: DOE award amount: $2,499,178

properties.entities: University of Illinois, CarbonCapture Inc, CarbonCure
properties.capture_storage_details: An advanced DAC and utilization system coupled to CO2 conversion at U.S. Steel’s Gary Works
properties.notes: DOE award amount: $3,459,554

properties.capture_storage_details: Will leverage thermal energy from the Brawley Geothermal Plant in Brawley, California, for a DAC system developed by Climeworks that will separate CO2 from ambient air, and is strategically located near a proposed geologic storage site.
properties.notes: DOE award amount: $2,495,197

properties.capture_storage_details: Integrated with an existing light water nuclear reactor at Constellation’s Byron Generating Station
properties.notes: DOE award amount: $2,500,000

properties.capture_storage_details: Heat-integrated carbon capture process
properties.notes: Funded by DOE/NETL

properties.capture_storage_details: Retrofit for Madison 3, the single biggest emitter in the electric generation sector in the state
properties.notes: According to data from the Environmental Protection Agency, Madison 3 emitted 3.8 short tons in 2021 and 3.7 million in 2020.

properties.capture_storage_details: Separate CO2 from ambient air and convert the CO2 into value-added chemicals.
properties.notes: DOE award amount: $2,934,380

properties.capture_storage_details: Cameron LNG Phase 1 and proposed Phase 2 export projects would potentially serve as the anchor source for the capture and sequestration of carbon dioxide
properties.notes: Last year, the Hackberry Carbon Sequestration project filed an application for a Class VI Injection well permit from the U.S. Environmental Protection Agency for permanent storage of up to 2 million tonnes per annum of CO2.

properties.capture_storage_details: Designed to achieve at least a 90 percent reduction in CO2 emissions
properties.notes: Full production expected by 2027

properties.capture_storage_details: New hydrogen production plant equipped with 8RH2 technology
properties.notes: DOE FEED study

properties.capture_storage_details: The captured CO2 will be transported via pipeline to the boundary of Chevron’s Kern River oil field and stored in deep saline aquifers
properties.notes: The company plans to use the 45Q tax credit

properties.capture_storage_details: The Carbon Capture and Storage (CCS) projects at the Yuma Ethanol and Sterling Ethanol plants would capture and store 95 percent of annual carbon dioxide emissions during the fermentation process before it can be released into the atmosphere.
properties.notes: Part of overarching project with both Yuma and Sterling plants

properties.capture_storage_details: The Carbon Capture and Storage (CCS) projects at the Yuma Ethanol and Sterling Ethanol plants would capture and store 95 percent of annual carbon dioxide emissions during the fermentation process before it can be released into the atmosphere.
properties.notes: Part of overarching project with both Yuma and Sterling plants

properties.capture_storage_details: Capture at hydrogen production
properties.notes: Capture and storage of CO2 from other large industrial facilities in the region and could ultimately store up to 15 MM metric tons per year across multiple onshore geologic storage sites

properties.entities: Wolf Carbon Solutions, Archer Daniels Midland (ADM)
properties.capture_storage_details: Capture and transport carbon dioxide produced at ADM's ethanol facilities at Clinton and Cedar Rapids, Iowa.
properties.notes: 350-mile steel pipeline, officially filed application with regulators June 2023

properties.capture_storage_details: Denbury estimates more than 50 million metric tons per year of existing stationary CO2 emissions are located within 30 miles of the site.
properties.notes: Denbury estimates first potential CO2 injection for the site as early as 2025.

properties.capture_storage_details: CO2 capture from natural gas processing. Storage to be CENLA Hub

properties.entities: Tampa Electric Company, ION Clean Energy Inc
properties.capture_storage_details: Retrofit of an existing 1,190-MW NGCC power station
properties.notes: DOE supported front-end engineering design (FEED) study

properties.entities: University of Kentucky, Electric Power Research Institute (EPRI), PPL Corporation
properties.capture_storage_details: Using a solvent-independent low-cost CO2 capture process retrofitted to the 700 MWe natural gas combined cycle (NGCC) power generation unit.
properties.notes: DOE supported front-end engineering design (FEED) study. In Feb 2024, selected as one of four projects to recieve up to $304M from OCED. Received $72M from DOE in Sept 2024 for R&D.

properties.capture_storage_details: Biphasic CO2 absorption process (BiCAP)
properties.notes: DOE supported front-end engineering design (FEED) study

properties.entities: University of Illinois, Voestalpine Texas LLC
properties.capture_storage_details: Cryocap technology on a hot briquetted iron plan that will use pressure swing adsorption capabilities with cryogenic refrigeration.
properties.notes: DOE supported front-end engineering design (FEED) study

properties.capture_storage_details: Class VI wells for permanent CO2 storage
properties.notes: The project is expected to be operational by late 2023

properties.entities: Lehigh Hanson, Mitsubishi Heavy Industries America
properties.capture_storage_details: Aims to incorporate features to minimize energy consumption and enable the utilization of alternative fuels and raw materials to reduce greenhouse gas emissions.
properties.notes: Sequester it in a sandstone or dolomite formation within the Illinois Basin.

properties.capture_storage_details: 1.1 million ton per annum blue ammonia
properties.notes: Leverages the recently signed US Inflation Reduction Act (IRA) to use 45Qs to reduce emissions by more than 70% on a life cycle basis compared to conventional ammonia production

properties.capture_storage_details: 1,800 MW combined-cycle natural gas power station
properties.notes: The project was made possible by the advancement of the recently passed federal legislation, known as the  Inflation Reduction Act, that expanded the 45Q federal tax credit for carbon capture.

properties.capture_storage_details: CCS project to sequester 95% of emissions from Bridgeport Ethanol facility's fermentation process
Leased land in Allen Parish for a possible sequestration project
CO2 capture from cement flue gas by using a NAS with 95% CO2 capture efficiency.
properties.notes: DOE supported front-end engineering design (FEED) study

properties.capture_storage_details: Privately held ranch agreed to lease Oxy 106,000 acres in Kleberg County to support “large-scale” DAC projects both for storage and acreage
properties.notes: Land has been leased

properties.entities: Carbon TerraVault JV Holdco, LLC, Lone Cypress Energy Services, LLC
properties.capture_storage_details: Blue hydrogen facility to to sequester 100,000 metric tons (MT) of carbon dioxide (CO2) per annum from a newly constructed blue hydrogen plant at the Elk Hills Field in Kern County
properties.notes: CARB has signed a CDMA, as the project stands it will sequester 100,000 Mt CO2 annually but targeting twice that if the project is expanded.

properties.project_name: Corpus Christi Carbon Sequestration Hub Project
properties.capture_storage_details: A proposed large-scale CO2 pipeline transportation system and sequestration facility for area emitters
properties.notes: Entities have signed letter of intent

properties.capture_storage_details: facility to capture the CO2 generated from the ethanol production process and safely and permanently store such emissions deep underground in a secure geologic reservoir

Recipient of 2610 FOA funding, plans to assess local industrial CO2 sources and storage reservoirs in Shelby County, Alabama to establish the feasibility of a commercial-scale geological storage complex. Plans to capture and store 1.7 million TPA from Alabama Power’s Plant Gaston, with potential for an additional 5 million TPA from cement and pulp and paper plants in the region.
properties.notes: Received DOE funding February 2023

properties.capture_storage_details: retrofit where the plant will be able to fire 100 percent sustainably sourced biomass and implement post-combustion CO2 capture technology developed by ION Clean Energy
properties.notes: 1.4 million grant from DOE as part of more than $131 million dollars for 33 research and development projects to advance the wide-scale deployment of carbon management technologies to reduce carbon dioxide (CO2) pollution

properties.capture_storage_details: Recipient of CarbonSAFE 2610 FOA funding, plans to accelerate the scale-up and deployment of commercial CO2 storage in basaltic rocks at a storage complex near Hermiston, Oregon.
properties.notes: Received DOE funding February 2023

properties.capture_storage_details: Recipient of 2610 FOA funding, plans to establish the technical and economic foundation to establish a geologically, environmentally, and societally feasible commercial-scale, locally acceptable regional geologic storage complex for carbon dioxide (CO2)
properties.notes: Received DOE funding February 2023

properties.capture_storage_details: Milestone Carbon plans to use the land to permanently dispose of industrial CO2 emissions in underground geologic formations, with the potential to sequester hundreds of millions of tons of carbon dioxide.
properties.notes: (March 2023) current intent to evaluate the 46,000 acres for sequestration

properties.entities: U.S. Steel Corporation, CarbonFree Chemicals Holdings
properties.capture_storage_details: signed a non-binding Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) to work together towards capturing CO2 emissions generated by U.S. Steel's Gary Works manufacturing plant using CarbonFree's SkyCycle™ technology.
properties.notes: Mineralization project; CarbonFree's SkyCycle technology is designed to trap carbon emissions from challenging-to-abate industrial sources, convert CO2 into precipitated calcium carbonate (PCC), and generate hydrochloric acid (HCl) as a co-product

properties.capture_storage_details: Norway's Yara (YAR.OL) and Canada's Enbridge (ENB.TO) plan to invest up to $2.9 billion to build a low-carbon blue ammonia production plant in Texas
properties.notes: planned for a long time but explicited cited IRA as a catalyst

properties.entities: Copenhagen Infrastructure Partners, Sustainable Fuels Group
properties.capture_storage_details: $4.6 billion ammonia production and export facility in St. Charles Parish aiming to sequester 90% of emissions

properties.entities: Adams Fork Energy LLC, Flandreau Santee Sioux Tribe, CNX Resources, Haldor Topsoe
properties.capture_storage_details: Clean ammonia project associated with ARCH2 Hydrogen Hub, to be developed on a reclaimed coal mining site in Mingo County, West Virginia. Gas feedstock coupled with CCS will be utilised to produce up to 2.16 million tonnes per year of ammonia, with additional expansion phases planned.
properties.notes: Announced in April 2023 and collaborating with ARCH2 Hydrogen Hub, construction expected to commence in 2024

properties.capture_storage_details: Located near Yuba City, California, the Sutter Energy Center is planning for a carbon capture project designed to capture and store approximately 1.75 million metric tons of CO2 per year.
properties.notes: Announced in April 2023 but still need permitting approval from SMUD; In 2023, was one of three projects funded for up to $890 mn (total) from OCED.

properties.capture_storage_details: commercial carbon capture facility at the existing Taft cogeneration power plant facility in Hahnville, Louisiana. The proposed project uses a solvent-based absorption post-combustion carbon capture system that separates and prepares for storage up to three million tons of CO2 per year representing a minimum of 90% of the CO2 emissions captured from the power plant.
properties.notes: Received DOE Funding May 2023

properties.project_name: Lake Charles Power Station Integrated CO2 Capture Project
properties.capture_storage_details: Full-scale integrated CO2 capture facility for Entergy Louisiana LLC’s natural gas combined cycle Lake Charles Power Station (LCPS).
properties.notes: Received DOE Funding May 2023. Originally a partnership between Entergy, Talos (now TotalEnergies) and Mitsubishi Heavy Industries. It appears Entergy has changed partners and selected Crescent Midstream for carbon management services, with technology support from SAMSUNG E&A and Honeywell

properties.capture_storage_details: Magnolia Sequestration Hub, LLC (Houston, Texas) intends to complete the site characterization, permitting, and environmental approvals for the Magnolia Sequestration Hub in Allen Parish, Louisiana, with an estimated 300 million metric tons of total CO2 storage capacity.
properties.notes: Received DOE Funding May 2023

properties.project_name: Timberlands Sequestration Pulp and Paper Project
properties.capture_storage_details: site characterization efforts to develop a biomass carbon removal and storage project for the Alabama River Cellulose pulp and paper mill located in Monroe County, Alabama
properties.notes: Received DOE Funding May 2023

properties.project_name: Great Green River Basin Storage Project
properties.capture_storage_details: commercial, multi-source, large-scale carbon capture and storage hub in Greater Green River Basin, Wyoming, with CO2 sourced from trona mining and direct air capture facilities.
properties.notes: Received DOE Funding May 2023

properties.capture_storage_details: Petcoke gasification to manufacture methanol
properties.notes: Construction starting spring 2022

properties.project_name: Colorado School of Mines Storage Project
properties.capture_storage_details: regional CO2 storage hub to address emissions from cement, hydrogen, and power plants, including geologic characterization efforts at two sites in Colorado’s Pueblo region.
properties.notes: Received DOE Funding May 2023

properties.capture_storage_details: carbon sequestration complex at Lapis Energy’s 14,000-acre site in St. Charles Parish
properties.notes: estimates 200 million metric tons capacity, will connect to existing CO2 pipeline network via a 45-mile pipeline in southeast Louisiana

properties.capture_storage_details: carbon sequestration site in Louisiana
properties.notes: estimates 100 million metric tons capacity, ready for injection 2026

properties.entities: Nucor Corporation, Exxon, Technip Energies, Turner Industries
properties.capture_storage_details: Exxon will capture, transport and store as much as 800,000 metric tons of carbon annually from the Nucor's steel manufacturing plant in Convent, Louisiana.
properties.notes: Signed a CCS agreement in June 2023

properties.capture_storage_details: Partnership between Summit and ethanol plant Absolute Energy as part of overarching Summit CCS project
joint pilot facility to produce freshwater resources and simultaneously increase carbon removal

properties.entities: Frontier Carbon Solutions Holdings LLC, Tailwater Capital LLC
properties.capture_storage_details: one of North America's first open source, multipurpose carbon storage hubs. The SCS Hub spans over 45,000 acres in southwestern Wyoming and will provide a carbon management solution for industrial emitters across the Mountain West
properties.notes: Received DOE CarbonSAFE funding June 2023

properties.entities: Marathon Petroleum, University of North Dakota EERC, TC Energy
properties.capture_storage_details: CCS installation on renewable diesel refinery, received $2.5 million from DOE

properties.entities: Battelle, Climeworks Corporation, Heirloom Carbon Technologies
properties.capture_storage_details: One of two recipients of DOE's DAC hubs funding from IIJA (topic area 3, build). Aims to capture more than 1 million tonnes of existing carbon dioxide (CO2) from the atmosphere each year and sequester the CO2 permanently deep underground.

One of two recipients of DOE's DAC hubs funding from IIJA (topic area 3, build). The South Texas DAC Hub is expected to include a Direct Air Capture facility designed to remove up to 1 million metric tons of CO2 annually with an associated saline geologic CO2 storage site.

aims to capture 1.4 million tonnes of carbon dioxide per year and is one of the world's largest CCUS projects. previously shuttered due to low oil prices during Covid-19, restarted operations in September 2023.
properties.notes: DOE project that originally began operations in 2016, was closed in 2020 after failing to capture targeted rates, and restarted operations in September 2023.

properties.capture_storage_details: Offshore storage, 24,000 acre tract of land situated in State waters, offshore Cameron Parish, to permanently store carbon dioxide
properties.notes: Estimated 250 million tons capacity, plans to utilize existing pipeline infrastructure, no published offtakers.

properties.capture_storage_details: Repsol-led partnership a contract for over 140,000 gross acres of pore space owned by of the Permanent School Fund (PSF) for CO2 storage located offshore of Corpus Christi, Texas
Carbon storage hub expected to capture and store up to 23 million tons of carbon emissions each year in underground wells
properties.notes: DOE contributing $98 million to development

properties.capture_storage_details: carbon capture and storage solution at Commonwealth's 9.3 million tonnes per annum LNG facility under development in Cameron, Louisiana.
properties.notes: Will store CO2 in the Cameron Storage hub

properties.capture_storage_details: This project will produce blue hydrogen for ammonia using 8 Rivers' 8RH2 process to capture 99% or more of CO2 from hydrogen production. The project will produce 880,000 tonnes a year of ammonia, requiring around 156,000 tonnes of H2 — equivalent to the production capacity of about 1.5GW of electrolysers.
DAC facility in Oklahoma, initial nameplate capacity of 7,000 tpy for EOR, with possibility to scale to 1 mtpy capacity and Class VI sequestration. Partner in CapturePoint's Oklahoma Carbon Hub.

This pilot project plans to deploy an innovative post-combustion carbon capture process at Delek’s Big Spring Refinery Fluidized Catalytic Cracking Unit and transport the CO2 via existing pipelines for permanent storage or utilization.
properties.notes: In 2024, selected as one of four projects to recieve funding from OCED to pilot CCS technologies.

properties.entities: RTI International in collaboration with IP, SLB, and Amazon
properties.capture_storage_details: Pilot project plans to build a carbon capture system at International Paper's (IP) pulp and paper mill. This first-of-its-kind carbon capture project for the pulp and paper industry
properties.notes: In 2024, selected as one of four projects to recieve funding from OCED to pilot CCS technologies.

properties.capture_storage_details: Awarded up to $500 M in federal funding via the Department of energy's Industrial Demonstrations Program. This project integrate carbon capture, transport, and storage at Heidelberg's cement plant in Mitchell, Indiana.
properties.storage_description: Mix of dedicated saline storage and utilization
properties.notes: Selected as an awardee of OCED's Industrial Demonstrations Program. The CO2 captured will either be stored or utilized, with no inidication as of yet the mix of storage vs. use.

properties.capture_storage_details: Awarded up to $500 M in federal funding via the Department of energy's Industrial Demonstrations Program. This project will use biomass and calcinated clay to produce limestone calcinated clay cement (L3). The plant will capture and sequester the remaining 950,000 tons of carbon dioxide per year.

Carbon storage for manufacturers, power plants, industrial processors and other industries in South Alabama. Awarded $18 in funding from FECM to support geologic characterization and permitting efforts. Preliminary numerical modeling of the three target storage reservoirs indicates an estimated storage capacity of between 188 million and 781 million Mt of CO2. Annual commitments of 2.6 million TPA.
properties.notes: Partners: Southern States Energy Board (award recipient), Tenaska, Advanced Resources International, Crescent Resource Innovation, ENTECH Strategies, the Geological Survey of Alabama, the University of South Alabama, Williams, Baker Hughes, Southern Company Services.

properties.project_name: Edwardsport Integrated Gasification Combined Cycle plant
properties.capture_storage_details: 617 MW coal combined cycle plant selected
properties.notes: FEED study funding awarded in Sep 2023. Estimated 400M tons of pore space capacity at site.

properties.capture_storage_details: Recipient of CarbonSAFE 2610 FOA funding, plans to geologically characterize several prospective reservoirs within Cambro-Ordovician strata under the Lehigh Hanson, Inc., Cement Plant in Mitchell, Indiana
properties.notes: REceived DOE funding February 2023, 50 million MT over 30 years (not annually)

properties.project_name: Ash Grove Foreman Cement Plant CCS
properties.entities: Ash Grove/CRH, Southern States Energy Board
properties.capture_storage_details: Cement plant selected for FEED funding as part of OCED's Carbon Capture Demonstrations Projects Program
properties.notes: FEED study funding awarded in Dec 2023. Storage facility TBD.

properties.capture_storage_details: CCS Storage Hub
properties.notes: Not much info on the website. No annual capacity or partners listed.

properties.project_name: Central Louisiana Regional Carbon Storage Hub (CENLA Hub)
properties.capture_storage_details: Storage of captured CO2 from Haynesville basin gas facilities, a blue methanol plant, and power generation facilities in NW Louisiana with a 150 mile pipeline to injection well sites in SW Louisiana.
properties.notes: May 2024: expanded LOI with pipeline operator Energy Transfer for 1.5M tons/yr. LOI with Bia Energy blue methanol project for 0.25M tons/yr,

properties.capture_storage_details: CCS Storage Hub
properties.location: Carroll, Harrison and Jefferson counties in Ohio; Hancock and Marshall counties in West Virginia; and Washington County in Pennsylvania
properties.notes: 2 above-ground injection wells planned. 12 in OH, 7 in WV, 3 in PA. This article interview with project lead says 5M tons per year: https://www.heraldstaronline.com/news/local-news/2024/04/carbon-capture-and-storage-coming-to-tri-state-area/

properties.project_name: Snowy River Carbon Dioxide Sequestration Project
properties.capture_storage_details: An estimated 150 million tons to be injected over 20 years at well sites located on BLM land in southeast Montana. Carbon will be transported via pipeline from Wyoming, presumably from the Shute Creek gas plant.
properties.notes: Project acquired by ExxonMobil after purchase of Denbury

properties.project_name: Weld County Storage (Class II and VI)
properties.storage_description: Dedicated Saline Storage and Enhanced Oil Recovery
properties.notes: Early stages of development, mix of EOR and Class VI, unknown capacity or offtake agreements. Will update when more info available.

properties.capture_storage_details:
Conversion of coal power plant to biomass with carbon capture (BECCS). CCS managed by Babcock & Wilcox using amine-based scrubber process, injection in the Niagaran
Reef trend
properties.notes: NETL project description: https://netl.doe.gov/sites/default/files/netl-file/23CM_CDR31_Gehring.pdf

properties.capture_storage_details: EOR with captured CO2 from bio-ethanol plant in Kansas.

properties.entities: Project details do not include CO2 capture quantity. Based on project figures of 7.2M tons of ammonia at full project deployment and the CATF Hydrogen Production calculator, total CO2 captured would be about 12M TPA. 1st phase of project deployment at 2.4M TPA of ammonia, for ~4M TPA of CO2.
properties.capture_storage_details: Blue hydrogen/ammonia production and export facility.
properties.notes: Project details do not include CO2 capture quantity. Based on project figures of 7.2M tons of ammonia at full project deployment and the CATF Hydrogen Production calculator, total CO2 captured would be about 12M TPA.

properties.capture_storage_details: CF Industries is in the early development stages of exploring multiple blue ammonia export projects. The Blue Point Complex would manufacture an estimated 500,000 tons of clean ammonia annually, using hydrogen produced via methane reformation with CCS.
properties.notes: CF is exploring multiple projects for blue ammonia export from its Blue Point facility. Announced initiation of FEED study with Mitsui in 2022, then POSCO in 2023, and JERA in 2024. No announcements have been made on completion of FEED studies or FID.

properties.capture_storage_details: 65,000 BPD renewable fuels facility with plans to produce SAF, renewable diesel, naptha, and propane.
properties.notes: LED page states, "the complex can store an estimated 380 million tons of carbon dioxide, enough to sequester decades of emissions from the production facility," but does not give an annual capture figure.

properties.capture_storage_details: FEED study funding awarded to NTEC for carbon capture at coal-fired power plant located on Navajo Nation land in New Mexico. Would integrate with CarbonSAFE Four Corners Storage Hub

properties.entities: New Mexico Institute of Mining and Technology, New Mexico Tech, Enchant Energy, more...
properties.capture_storage_details: Carbon injection hub in the San Juan basin of northwest New Mexico and southern Colorado. Part of NETL's CarbonSAFE initiative. This project is currently in site characterization phase (phase III). Estimated storage of 50 million tons over 30 years.

properties.project_name: Houston Ship Channel CCS Innovation Zone
properties.capture_storage_details: Offshore storage
properties.notes:
Once it is fully online, sequestering 100 million metric tons of CO2 per year. 
[MH, 10/9/24]: The 100 MTPA figure is representative of the entire Gulf Coast region's industrial emissions, not the capacity of the project.

properties.capture_storage_details: Waste to jet and diesel fuels (gasification)
CO2 separation from LaBarge gas fields
Sequestration hub

properties.entities: One Earth Energy, University of Illinois
properties.capture_storage_details: DOE grant under FOA 1999 is supporting capture assessment at this facility.
properties.storage_description: Dedicated Saline Storage (Part of U.S. DOE's CarbonSafe program)
properties.notes: DOE grant under FOA 1999 is supporting capture assessment at this facility

properties.capture_storage_details: 816 Mwe retrofit at a 1600 Mwe Coal plant retrofit. S&L doing FEED study.
properties.storage_description: Dedicated Saline Storage (Part of U.S. DOE's CarbonSafe program)
properties.notes: DOE grants awarded for FEED (DOE FOA 2058) on capture and for saline storage characterization (DOE FOA 1999)

properties.capture_storage_details: The project will also be the world’s largest carbon capture for sequestration operation, permanently sequestering CO2 in dedicated underground storage.
properties.notes: The complex will produce over 750 million standard cubic feet per day of blue hydrogen for Air Products’ pipeline customers in the U.S. Gulf Coast and blue ammonia for global hydrogen markets.

properties.capture_storage_details: Capturing 95 percent of total CO2 emissions from a NGCC power plant
properties.notes: DOE grant for a project that will use Shell’s patented CANSOLV CO2 capture technology, which utilizes a regenerable amine with low parasitic energy consumption, fast kinetics and extremely low volatility, and has been tested at commercial scale for CO2 capture from coal flue gas streams for eight years.

properties.capture_storage_details: Capture and store CO2 from gas pre-treatment and exhaust gas
properties.notes: At full scale, Rio Grande LNG will be capable of producing 27 million metric tonnes of clean LNG for export to markets around the world.

properties.capture_storage_details: Gas processing facility supplying CO2 for Occidental EOR operations in Permian fields.
Gerald Gentleman Station coal fired power Unit-2 with nameplate capacity of 700 Mwe. But capture being designed to capture - 600 Mwe (2 parallel 300 Mwe units) S&L doing FEED study.
properties.notes: DOE grants awarded for FEED (DOE FOA 2058)

properties.capture_storage_details: Net-zero greenhouse gas emissions from the producing reservoir through to the loading dock. Partners include Siemens Energy Inc., 8 Rivers/NET Power, and EJM Associates LLC.
properties.notes: Promising net-zero carbon emissions from upstream to dockside by as early as 2027

properties.capture_storage_details: Project Tundra - Milton R Young Station Unit-2, a 477 MW unit. Fluor is leading FEED.
properties.storage_classification: Dedicated Saline Storage & Enhanced Oil Recovery
properties.storage_description: Dedicated Saline Storage & Enhanced Oil Recovery
properties.notes: DOE grant awarded for FEED DOE (DOE FOA 2058) and for saline storage characterization (DOE FOA 1999); In 2023 was awarded up to $350 million under IIJA Carbon Capture Demonstration Projects Program

properties.capture_storage_details: Autothermal reforming hydrogen production technology to produce the hydrogen and aims to capture and store 95% of the carbon emissions from the process
properties.notes: The plant has the capacity to capture up to 3 million tonnes of CO2 per annum, which is currently sent via a 205-mile pipeline to Saskatchewan, Canada, where it is used for enhanced oil recovery operations.

properties.capture_storage_details: Ability to capture carbon dioxide (CO2) through the Rectisol process

properties.project_name: Dry Fork Integrated Carbon Capture and Storage Project
properties.entities: Membrane Technology and Research (MTR), CarbonSAFE, Basin Electric Power Cooperative
properties.capture_storage_details: Coal-based power plan selected for FEED funding as part of OCED's Carbon Capture Demonstrations Projects Program.
properties.notes: FEED funding awarded in March 2024. Storage facility TBD

properties.capture_storage_details: Bio-SAF facility in Cherryvale, KS. Will be constructed in 2 phases: each phase ~10,000 barrel per day capacity. Full capacity facility will process ~1 million tons of ag-based feedstock and displace 2.6 mpty of CO2.

properties.entities: Basin Electric Dry Fork Station, MTR Carbon Capture
properties.capture_storage_details: FEED led by MTR. 400 Mwe of the 420 MW plant. Project plans to capture 60% of CO2 emissions.
properties.notes: DOE grants awarded for FEED (DOE FOA 2058) and for saline storage characterization (DOE FOA 1999); Oct 2023 open: https://county17.com/2023/10/09/photos-carbon-capture-demonstration-plant-begins-work-near-gillette/; In Feb. 2024, selected as one of four projects to recieve up to $304 mn from OCED.

properties.capture_storage_details: Capture from blue ammonia
properties.notes: Will qualify for 45Q

properties.capture_storage_details: Ammonia production using petcoke gasification with CCS for clean hydrogen production.
properties.notes: CarbonSAFE project. Greenlit for $1.56 B conditional LPO loan in September, 20224.

properties.capture_storage_details: Capture from production of low carbon gasoline from natural gas

Systems International is constructing two 120 MW power plants to produce carbon free electricity. No air or water emissions will be released. The plant will be using multiple and interchangeable feedstocks. Systems International and Jacobs Engineering will begin construction in 2020.
properties.notes: Financing of projects will be completed through Private Activity Bonds issued by the Gulf Coast Authority. Wells Fargo Securities is the placement and distribution agent.

properties.capture_storage_details: Elk Hills Power Plant 550 MW NGCC retrofit. EPRI is doing FEED.
properties.notes: DOE grant awarded for FEED.

properties.capture_storage_details: Unavailable

Potentially, the Dave Johnston coal power plant. It's a 762 MW plant, which needs to either shut or sell by 2022 (initially set to retire in 2027). Potential CCS on 330 MW unit 4. Potential storage in South Glenrock B oil field in Converse County, potentially extracting 14,000 b/d using CO2-EOR.
properties.notes: The break-even price of oil production is estimated at $55-$60/b.

properties.capture_storage_details: Commercial steam methane reforming (SMR) hydrogen plant
properties.notes: Designed to recover at least 90 percent of the CO2 from a flue gas stream produced by the SMR process.

properties.project_name: Illinois Industrial Carbon Capture and Storage
properties.capture_storage_details: Stores captured CO2 safely almost a mile and a half underground in the Mt. Simon Sandstone.

properties.capture_storage_details: Replace emission from coal plant with oxy-fuel natural gas, 280 MW

properties.notes: Illinois and Colorado plants will be Net Power’s first commercial-scale units

properties.capture_storage_details: Carbon capture from our two steam methane reformers located within the Valero Refinery
The project will reduce overall facility CO2 emissions by 95 percent
properties.notes: DOE grant for a project that will use Shell’s CANSOLV, an amine-based post-combustion technology, to recover CO2 from several olefin plants, aromatic plants and an on-site cogeneration plant.

properties.notes: "Svante’s capital cost advantage, combined with progressive tax credit policies such as the 45Q tax credit in the U.S., can make carbon capture profitable across a range of large-scale industrial applications like cement”

properties.capture_storage_details: On site capture and storage at Pacific Ethanol Pekin site consisting of three ethanol productions facilities.
CO2 is transported 193km by pipeline for use in EOR projects at the Golden Trend oilfield and the Sko-Vel-Tum oilfield
Produces ammonia and urea ammonium nitrate (UAN) fertilizers.

properties.capture_storage_details: Carbon capture and sequestration project that will create the infrastructure to transport CO2 from Iowa to North Dakota for deposit into geologic storage.
properties.notes: Green Plains’ expanded annual commitment is approximately 1.9 million metric tons of carbon dioxide, the same amount of carbon sequestered by 2.3 million acres of U.S. forests in a year, according to the EPA. The expanded project is anticipated to begin operation in 2024.

properties.entities: Blue Flint Ethanol, Harvestone Low Carbon Partners (HCLP), Midwest AgEnergy
properties.capture_storage_details: Blue Flint has managed to capture 100% of their Co2 emissions from the fermentation process, through using CCS. Once captured, the company is able to inject an estimated 600 metric tons of Co2 daily. This Co2 is then stored permanently underground, at an estimated one mile below the surface, in the Broom Creek formation.

properties.capture_storage_details: Converting wood waste into hydrogen fuel while also capturing, using, and sequestering carbon dioxide (CO2) emissions that result from its process.
properties.notes: Potentially, permanently storing its CO2 in concrete using CarbonCure’s carbon removal technology, which is used in CO2 mineralization systems at concrete plants.

properties.capture_storage_details: Retrofit of an existing 857-MW NGCC power station with geologic storage in the Sacramento Basin
properties.notes: DOE grant for a design effort that will utilize ION’s ICE-21 solvent and will take full advantage of the solvent benefits, which include a smaller physical plant.

properties.capture_storage_details: carbon capture and storage project on a biofuels plant in the Port of Stockton, CA.
Capture from two hydrogen facilities and a SAF facility
properties.notes: Will begin immediate development of the first of two 600 ton per day blue hydrogen and blue ammonia facilities, as well as manufacturing for carbon neutral bio-based chemicals and plastics.

properties.capture_storage_details: Two 1 million metric ton per year wells
properties.notes: Project will inject captured CO2 from nearby facilities to generate LCF credits

properties.capture_storage_details: Storage hub in Oklahoma near Kansas border. Currently capturing 750,000 tonnes per year from a nitrogen fertilizer plant in KS for use in EOR. Planned capacity of 2-4 million tonnes per year permanent storage. Pending partnerships an SAF bio-production facility (azure) and a commercial-scale DAC facility (Heimdal).

properties.entities: Strategic Biofuels Llc Hatch, Koch Project Solutions
properties.capture_storage_details: Capture from waste biomass to renewable fuels project
properties.notes: The plant will ultimately produce up to 33.7 million gallons of renewable fuel per year from forestry waste.

properties.entities: Holcim, University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign
properties.capture_storage_details: The capture technology has the ability to achieve 95 percent capture from flue gas.
properties.notes: DOE grant for a design that will employ Air Liquide's CryocapTM FG system, which combines pressure swing adsorption to preconcentrate the CO2 in the feedstream with cryogenic refrigeration technologies to purify and compress the CO2 product, thereby achieving high CO2 capture rates with high CO2 purity.

properties.entities: Summit Carbon Solutions, Green Plains, Husker Ag, and Louis Dreyfus Company, Valero
properties.capture_storage_details: Dozens of carbon dioxide emission sources, primarily biorefineries, from across the Midwestern United States to permanent geologic storage sites in North Dakota.
properties.notes: Committed CO2 volume will likely result in commitments exceeding the company’s original target of 10 million metric tons per year. In 2024, Valero, the world’s second largest corn ethanol producer, agreed to join the Summit Project. Eight of Valero’s ethanol facilities across Iowa, Nebraska, Minnesota, and South Dakota will be incorporated into the project. Poet has also announced it will partner with Summit after Navigator cancelled its project.

properties.capture_storage_details: Offshore and onshore storage
properties.notes: Talos purchased by TotalEnergies in 2024 (with 25% stake in project). Carbonvert's 25% stake acquired by Equinor in August 2023. Chevron's 50% stake purchased from Talos in 2022.

properties.capture_storage_details: 1 million tonnes of CO2 injected per year in the Elk Hills Field. In 2023, EPA released draft Class VI well permits for underground carbon dioxide (CO2) injection and storage in CTV’s 26-R reservoir

properties.project_name: Low-carbon hydrogen, ammonia and carbon capture facility is expected to produce one billion cubic feet of low-carbon hydrogen per day, making it the largest low-carbon hydrogen project in the world at planned startup in 2027-2028
properties.capture_storage_details: Designed to capture 95% or more of CO2 emissions from turbines and auxiliary boilers at this facility
properties.notes: In 2023 was one of three project selected to be funded for up to $890 mn (total) from OCED.

properties.entities: Mustang Station of Golden Spread Electric Cooperative (GSEC)
properties.capture_storage_details: University of Texas at Austin is leading FEED. 464 Mwe NGCC portion of the plant will be studied.
properties.notes: DOE grant awarded for FEED.

properties.capture_storage_details: NGCC retrofit of a 758 MW plant. FEED being conducted by Bechtel National. No clear indication of host plant, but Panda Energy has three 758 MW plants - Temple 1, Temple 2 and Sherman power plants in close proximity to existing EOR, in Texas.
properties.notes: U.S. Department of Energy (DOE) grant awarded for FEED (DOE FOA 2058.

properties.entities: Port of Corpus Christi Authority, Howard Energy Partners
properties.capture_storage_details: Capture from hydrogen production
properties.notes: This target has been formalised with the signing of a memorandum of understanding (MoU) that will look to convert Howard’s Javelina refinery with the site strategically positioned to connect six local refineries through pipelines.

properties.capture_storage_details: Applied for two Class VI permits for an additional 80 million metric tons of permanent carbon dioxide (CO2) storage for two new Carbon TerraVault carbon capture and storage (CCS) projects in the Sacramento basin,
This storage hub project would store carbon under 600,00 acres of public, BLM-managed land in Southwest Wyoming.

properties.entities: Minnkota Power Cooperative, Mitsubishi Heavy Industries (MHI)
properties.capture_storage_details: Project will capture up to ~4 million tons of CO2 per annum from Minnkota’s Milton R. Young Station in North Dakota
properties.notes: Award funding in 2023 via OCED's CC demos program

properties.entities: Rainbow Energy Center, EERC (University of North Dakota)
properties.capture_storage_details: Formerly the Coal Creek Power Station, Rainbow Energy purchased the plant in 2022 and plans to install CCS
properties.notes: Received CarbonSAFE awards, plans to sequester 200 million metric tons CO2
